title: Cervical clinic review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.
red_flags.rationale: Supports cervical pain red-flag assessment for cervical pain clinic review; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Neck Pain – 22

examination.text: Supports onset, duration, pain character, arm radiation, paraesthesia, activity impact, posture, movement, range of motion, palpation, neurological assessment, gait, and provocative-manoeuvre documentation.
examination.rationale: Supports onset, radiation, activity, posture, range, neurological and gait documentation for cervical pain clinic review; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports onset, duration, pain character, arm radiation, paraesthesia, activity impact, posture, movement, range of motion, palpation, neurological assessment, gait, and provocative-manoeuvre documentation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Neck Pain – 22

exact_section.heading: 7. Clinical History and face-to-face examination elements

referral.text: Lists trauma, persistent symptoms, headache, numbness or tingling, lower-limb weakness, gait or coordination issues, bowel or bladder dysfunction, immunosuppression, weight loss, fever, and chest symptoms.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-led referral context for cervical pain clinic review; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Lists trauma, persistent symptoms, headache, numbness or tingling, lower-limb weakness, gait or coordination issues, bowel or bladder dysfunction, immunosuppression, weight loss, fever, and chest symptoms.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Clinic diagnosis, prior treatment, medicine response, functional goals, specialist examination, procedures and longitudinal plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for cervical pain clinic review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
